ad_account_id.label: Ad Account ID
ad_account_id.description: Unique identifier of an ad account. This can be found in the Pinterest UI by following the steps mentioned [here](https://developers.pinterest.com/docs/conversions/conversions/#Find%20your%20%2Cad_account_id).

conversion_token.label: Conversion Token
conversion_token.description: The conversion token for your Pinterest account. This can be found in the Pinterest UI by following the steps mentioned [here](https://developers.pinterest.com/docs/conversions/conversions/#Get%20the%20conversion%20token).

reportConversionEvent.title: Report Conversion Event
reportConversionEvent.description: Report events directly to Pinterest. Data shared can power Pinterest solutions that will help evaluate ads effectiveness and improve content, targeting, and placement of future ads.

event_name.label: Event Name
event_name.description: The conversion event type. For custom events, you must use the predefined event name "custom". Please refer to the possible event types in [Pinterest API docs](https://developers.pinterest.com/docs/api/v5/#operation/events/create).

action_source.label: Action Source
action_source.description: The source indicating where the conversion event occurred. This must be app_android, app_ios , web or offline.

event_time.label: Event Timestamp
event_time.description: Device IDs can be used to add and remove only anonymous users to/from a cohort. However, users with an assigned User ID cannot use Device ID to sync to a cohort.

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: A unique id string that identifies this event and can be used for deduping between events ingested via both the conversion API and Pinterest tracking.

event_source_url.label: Event Source URL
event_source_url.description: URL of the web conversion event.

opt_out.label: Opt Out
opt_out.description: When action_source is web or offline, it defines whether the user has opted out of tracking for web conversion events. While when action_source is app_android or app_ios, it defines whether the user has enabled Limit Ad Tracking on their iOS device, or opted out of Ads Personalization on their Android device.

user_data.label: User Data
user_data.description: Object containing customer information data. Note, It is required at least one of 1) em, 2) hashed_maids or 3) pair client_ip_address + client_user_agent..

hashed_maids.label: Mobile Ad Identifier
hashed_maids.description: User’s Google advertising ID (GAIDs) or Apple’s identifier for advertisers (IDFAs).

client_ip_address.label: Client IP Address
client_ip_address.description: The IP address of the browser corresponding to the event.

client_user_agent.label: Client User Agent
client_user_agent.description: User agent of the device the API call originated from.

phone.label: Phone Number
phone.description: A phone number. Include only digits with country code, area code, and number. Remove symbols, letters, and any leading zeros. In addition, always include the country code, even if all of the data is from the same country, as the country code is used for matching.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: Any unique ID from the advertiser, such as loyalty membership IDs, user IDs, and external cookie IDs. You can send one or more external IDs for a given event.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Gender in lowercase. Either f or m.

date_of_birth.label: Date of Birth
date_of_birth.description: A date of birth given as year, month, and day. Example: 19971226 for December 26, 1997.

city.label: City
city.description: A city in lowercase without spaces or punctuation. Example: menlopark.

state.label: State
state.description: A two-letter state code in lowercase. Example: ca.

zip.label: Zip Code
zip.description: A five-digit zip code for United States. For other locations, follow each country`s standards.

country.label: Country
country.description: A two-letter country code in lowercase.

click_id.label: Click ID
click_id.description: The unique identifier stored in _epik cookie on your domain or &epik= query parameter in the URL.

partner_id.label: Partner ID
partner_id.description: A unique identifier of visitors' information defined by third party partners.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code. If not provided, it will default to the currency set for the ad account.

value.label: Value
value.description: Total value of the event. E.g. if there are multiple items in a checkout event, value should be the total price of all items

content_ids.label: Content IDs
content_ids.description: Product IDs as an array of strings

contents.label: Product Info
contents.description: A list of objects containing information about products.

num_items.label: Number of Items
num_items.description: Total number of products in the event.

search_string.label: Search string
search_string.description: Search string related to the conversion event.

opt_out_type.label: Opt Out Type
opt_out_type.description: opt_out_type is the field where we accept opt outs for your users’ privacy preference.  It can handle multiple values with commas separated.

os_version.label: OS Version
os_version.description: Version of the device operating system.

wifi.label: Wifi
wifi.description: Whether the event occurred when the user device was connected to wifi.

language.label: Language
language.description: Two-character ISO-639-1 language code indicating the user's language.
